rent.note: furnished 1BR in Varoš or Lučac; €750–€1,000 off-season base

diningOut.note: Dalmatian cuisine; tourist premium in peak season

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; growing coworking scene in Split

simData.note: Croatian SIM; T-Mobile or A1 prepaid

misc.note: gym, toiletries, beach activities, entertainment, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Coastal city peaks strongly Jun–Aug.

evidence.claim: 1BR Split city centre €750–€1,400 depending on area; 20-30% higher Jul–Aug
evidence.quote: Split runs €800 to €1,400 in central areas. Varoš & Lučac: €750 - €1,000/month. Expect prices to be 20-30% higher in the peak tourist months of July and August

evidence.claim: realistic solo nomad budget €1,600–€1,900/mo in Split
evidence.quote: For a single person renting in a major city like Split, the realistic cost of living in 2026 is between €1,600 – €1,900 per month for a comfortable, yet moderate lifestyle
Beyond rent, a monthly grocery budget for one person runs approximately €200 to €350, and internet costs about 30 EUR per month in Croatia

evidence.claim: Split digital nomad monthly costs $1,500–2,000 range
